landing.title: Find Your Perfect Hairstyle
landing.subtitle: Upload a photo and get personalized hairstyle recommendations in seconds — all on your device, completely private.
landing.privacyNote: Your photos never leave your device.

camera.permissionDenied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings, or upload a photo instead.
camera.notAvailable: Camera is not available on this device. Please upload a photo instead.

validation.title: Let's try again
validation.NO_FACE: We couldn't detect a face in your photo. Please try again with a clear, front-facing photo.
validation.MULTIPLE_FACES: We detected more than one face. Please upload a photo with just you in it.
validation.FACE_TOO_SMALL: Your face is too small in the photo. Try a closer-up selfie or crop the photo to focus on your face.
validation.NOT_FRONTAL: Please face the camera directly for the best results. Avoid turning your head to the side.

tips.title: Tips for a great photo:
tips.tip3: Keep your hair away from your face
tips.tip5: Fill the frame with your face

processing.slow: This is taking longer than usual...

description.oval: Your face is gently rounded with a slightly narrower forehead and jaw. The oval shape is considered the most versatile for hairstyles.
description.round: Your face has a similar width and length with soft, rounded features. Styles that add height and angles work beautifully.
description.square: Your face has a strong, angular jawline with a forehead and jaw of similar width. Bold, structured styles complement your features.
description.heart: Your forehead is wider than your jaw, tapering to a narrower chin. Styles that add width at the jaw level balance your proportions.
description.oblong: Your face is longer than it is wide with a narrow profile. Styles that add width and volume at the sides create a balanced look.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.modelLoadFailed: We couldn't load the face detection model. Please check your connection and try again.
